prompt: The intake form builder is possessed. Yesterday I marked insurance_id as mandatory on the Lakeview clinic's form, and now Riverside's form — a different clinic, different FormSchema object — rejects patients for leaving the comments box blank, a field nobody ever configured as mandatory. It gets worse the longer the process runs: our staging box, which builds all forty clinic forms at boot, ends up with basically every optional field demanding a value. And a unit test I wrote this morning constructed a fresh FormSchema and it came up already containing another clinic's fields?! The module is form_schema.py, maybe 80 lines, I've read it ten times and every line looks reasonable. python3 test_form_schema.py reproduces the whole mess. Please fix form_schema.py so the tests pass — the tests themselves are correct, leave them alone.
